SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-16-2017 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSEPH ABRAHAM ABILAR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CALIFORINA AUTO GLASS. PLAINTIFF ERRONEOUSLY THOUGHT THE MATTER WAS SET FOR HEARING ON THE 6:30 CALENDAR, AND DID NOT ARRIVE UNTIL WELL AFTER 6:00 P.M. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. DEFENDANT MUST BE SERVED WITH NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
